views.activityDesc: History of your actions in the system. Records are stored locally and not sent to the server.

welcome.title: Graphinya
welcome.desc: Data visualization and monitoring system by {lab}
welcome.featureDashboardsDesc: Real-time data visualization with widgets and variables
welcome.featureExplorerDesc: Execute arbitrary queries to data sources
welcome.featureSourcesDesc: Prometheus, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Elasticsearch and more
welcome.featurePluginsDesc: Extensible architecture with contracts for new sources
welcome.featureModulesDesc: Custom widgets and settings via Module Federation
welcome.featureAuthDesc: Secure authentication with automatic token refresh
welcome.quickStart: Press {demo} to quickly switch to demo mode or {help} for keyboard shortcuts
welcome.demoHint: Demo mode — data is generated for demonstration purposes
welcome.connectHint: Connect to a server or enable demo mode to view dashboards.
welcome.notConnected: Connect to the Graphinya server to manage data sources.
welcome.pluginsHint: Connect to the Graphinya server to view installed plugins.
welcome.modulesHint: Connect to the Graphinya server to view installed modules.
welcome.dashboardsEmptyDesc: Create your first dashboard to get started
welcome.datasourcesEmptyDesc: Create your first data source to connect to your systems
welcome.pluginsEmptyDesc: Make sure plugins are configured in docker-compose.yml
